boundary_binding.action_boundary: May AP execute the requested payment, invoice release, or vendor-master action? Focus: vendor name variation resolved by tax ID and master record.
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: SRC-94F130263D7B-CTL confirms tax ID and vendor master alias link is current, exact, and tied to the action. SRC-94F130263D7B-POL permits execution when source records close the boundary.
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: SRC-94F130263D7B-CTL states the tax ID and vendor master alias link is current, exact, and tied to the requested action.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: No open source-record defects remain. Vendor name variation alone does not block execution per SRC-94F130263D7B-BND.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: Control record SRC-94F130263D7B-CTL matches actor, scope, effective date, and system boundary. Dependency resolved by exact source.

critical_features_preserved: tax ID and vendor master alias link
final_answer: The action may proceed. The control record (SRC-94F130263D7B-CTL) confirms the tax ID and vendor master alias link is current and exact, satisfying the action boundary. Policy (SRC-94F130263D7B-POL) allows execution when source records close the boundary. Name variation alone is not a defect per communication boundary (SRC-94F130263D7B-BND).
open_blockers: Gov chooses control actions, not models.
